title: Vocabulary List 3 (Words 381-400)
description: Test your knowledge of words 381 to 400

questions.explanation: (Verb) To entertain or amuse someone with stories, jokes, or food

options.text: To entertain or amuse someone with stories, jokes, or food
To make someone sad or angry
To ignore someone completely
To teach someone a lesson

questions.explanation: (Noun/Verb) A loud, hearty laugh that is hard to control

options.text: A loud, hearty laugh that is hard to control
A quiet whisper or soft sound
A cry of sadness or pain
An angry shout or yell

questions.explanation: (Noun) The belief that God is present in everything in nature

questions.explanation: (Noun) Something given or left to someone in a will after a person dies

questions.explanation: (Adjective) A government that has complete control and does not allow opposition

questions.explanation: (Adjective) Based on observation or experience rather than theory

options.text: Based on observation or experience rather than theory

questions.explanation: (Noun) The process of releasing strong emotions and feeling relieved afterward

questions.explanation: (Adjective) Below the level of conscious awareness; influencing you without you realizing it
